integration_validation_v2.evidence: source_evidence.rs:484-681 pose_media_anchor_verification_matrix (6 anchors pose/media/artifact/workflow/external-tools/diagnostics, all cited paths exist incl 0090_atelier_pose_sidecars.sql/0040_atelier_media_artifact_manifest.sql); tests/atelier_source_evidence_tests.rs:383 records+reloads via live PG, asserts every anchor VERIFIED with existing paths + EventLedger verified_anchor_count (:488). Non-blocking: anchor 'VERIFIED' asserts file existence only, not behavior of the cited module

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 proof already live-PG STRONG; concern was anchor VERIFIED over-claiming. Resolved by contract scoping: proof_targets now states anchor VERIFIED asserts cited paths exist - behavioral proof carried by each module's own MT proof refs. Proof test atelier_source_evidence_tests.rs:383-504 mt082: 6-anchor matrix, all required anchors VERIFIED with non-empty existing paths, PG re-read with anchor round-trip, EventLedger verified_anchor_count=6/blocked=0. Sibling MT-002 V3 test raises the anchor bar (migrations applied + tables live) for the shared mechanism.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
